description.value:
Frequency once per day

Many talphi philosophers have studied the forces underlying the universe for countless generations, finding ways to link their minds to primordial forces much like solarians. You can steady your body and mind to attune yourself to the ultradense core of your home planet, channeling the pressure and density of its core through your weapon. Add 1d4 bludgeoning damage per weapon damage die to the next attack you make with your weapon before the end of your next turn. On a critical hit, roll these damage die after doubling the weapon's damage.
